project_info.founder_positioning: Ex-Oracle LMS (License Management Services) employee with deep Oracle licensing expertise
project_info.vibe: Simple professional, functional, conservative B2B aesthetic, trustworthy, authoritative

hierarchy.overline: text-xs sm:text-sm tracking-[0.2em] uppercase font-semibold text-zinc-500

spacing_and_layout.strategy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Wide margins, stark whitespace. Use p-8 to p-16 inside containers. Sections require py-24 or py-32 to breathe.
spacing_and_layout.grid_system: The 'Grid Borders' Technical Look. Use border-collapse logic for feature grids to expose the skeleton, creating a data-heavy, precise feel suitable for CIOs.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Strict left-alignment for headers, paragraphs, and lists to mimic executive briefs and documentation. Avoid center-alignment disease.

surfaces_and_borders.style: Flat Solid surfaces with crisp 1px borders. Zero soft drop-shadows. Shadows should be hard/solid if used at all (Neobrutalist influence but highly toned down for enterprise).
surfaces_and_borders.radius: rounded-none or max 2px (rounded-sm) to maintain a rigid, technical structure.

hero_background.placement: Hero section background, set to very low opacity (e.g., 5-10%) or mixed with a white gradient to ensure text readability.

tech_abstract.description: Detailed view of a server rack with focus on technology.
tech_abstract.placement: Cloud Migration / BYOL context or to break up solid text sections.

founder_portrait.description: Professional executive sitting confidently with screens in background.
founder_portrait.placement: Used in the 'Why Advalora / Founder Credibility' section to establish instant trust.

motion_and_interaction.hover: Buttons shift background color crisply. Links get an underline with an offset.
motion_and_interaction.scroll: Smooth scrolling via Lenis for a premium feel. Subtle fade-in-up for major sections.

html_custom: Hero Section: High-contrast split or stark left-aligned layout.
Services Grid: pure HTML + Tailwind grid with 'border-r border-b border-zinc-200' on items.
Process Steps: Numbered vertical timeline or horizontal cards with massive typography for numbers.
shadcn_ui: Accordion: Heavily customized for FAQs. Flat, 1px bottom border, left-aligned.
Form/Input/Textarea: For the Lead Capture section. Sharp corners, background zinc-50.
components.icons: Use Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) in 'regular' or 'light' weight.

testing.data_testid: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a single-page scrolling landing page prioritizing B2B enterprise conversion.
Install and use @phosphor-icons/react for a premium enterprise icon set.
Include a visible Sticky Header with Logo, Navigation Links, and CTA button. Use solid background or crystal glassmorphism for the header.
Design the Hero Section with a stark, outcome-focused value proposition targeting CIOs/CTOs, alongside two CTAs ('Book Discovery Call' and a WhatsApp link).
Include a 'Pain Points' section (Audit risk, ULA traps, overspending) using a problem-solution layout.
Design a 'Services' grid displaying Oracle audit defense, optimization, contract negotiation, compliance, and cloud migration (BYOL/OCI).
Include a dedicated 'Founder Expertise' section highlighting the Ex-Oracle LMS background.
Include an FAQ section using Shadcn Accordion.
Include a Lead Capture Form section above the Footer.
Ensure 'Cabinet Grotesk' is used for Headings and 'IBM Plex Sans' for Body text.
Enforce strict left-alignment on content. Avoid center-alignment disease.
Do not use generic 'Vercel/Stripe' shadows. Use flat, structural 1px grid borders.
